about.title: About Von Navi
about.intro: At Globopuerto Von Navi, every flight becomes a unique and unforgettable experience. Thanks to the care and dedication of our team, we ensure that each client enjoys every moment, conveying our commitment and passion in everything we do.
about.missionText: We offer hot air balloon flights that are not just a trip, but an experience full of magic and beauty. We want our passengers to take home memories that last a lifetime while enjoying the impressive landscapes of the sunrise, something that can only be experienced from the heights.
about.visionText: We want Von Navi to be a trusted and prestigious company, recognized for providing the best flight experiences that leave a special mark on those who choose us.

faq.a: We fly in a balloon every day of the year in the archaeological zone of Teotihuacán.

faq.q: Is it safe to fly in a balloon over Teotihuacán?
faq.a: Yes, our pilots are certified and the balloons meet all safety standards.

faq.q: What material are the balloons made of?
faq.a: The balloons are made of certified resistant materials for commercial flight.

faq.q: Can you fly in any weather?
faq.a: Flights are made in favorable weather conditions, usually at sunrise when winds are milder.

faq.q: Why do you ask for my weight?
faq.a: Passenger weight is important for balloon distribution and capacity, ensuring a safe flight.

hero.title:
Hot Air Balloon
Teotihuacán
hero.subtitle: Experience the most thrilling adventure over the pyramids. Dawn from the heights.
hero.note: Our flights depart from the renowned Balloon Port in Teotihuacán, meeting point of the best hot air balloon companies in Teotihuacán. This place offers comfortable facilities, parking and direct access to the archaeological zone.

experience.title: Hot Air Balloon Teotihuacán: Live the Most Exciting Experience Over the Pyramids
experience.subtitle: Discover the best hot air balloon flight in Teotihuacán and watch the sunrise from the heights like never before. Our exclusive balloon ride in Teotihuacán takes you soaring over one of Mexico's most iconic archaeological zones. Led by Miguel Monterrubio, certified pilot with years of experience in balloon flights over Teotihuacán, you will live a safe, magical and absolutely unforgettable experience.
experience.dawnTitle: Experience Sunrise Flying in a Balloon Over Teotihuacán
experience.text1: During your balloon journey in Teotihuacán, the silence of the sky is only broken by the roar of the burner. The gentle morning breeze and panoramic views connect you with history and nature on a deep level.
experience.fromSky: From the air, you will admire:
experience.item1: The majestic Pyramids of the Sun and Moon
experience.item2: The ancestral urban layout of the ancient city
experience.item3: Plazas, causeways and pre-Columbian residential complexes
experience.extra: This hot air balloon flight in Teotihuacán is not just a tourist activity, but an opportunity to see the world from a completely new perspective.

services.title: Premium Services for an Unforgettable Balloon Ride
services.subtitle: We offer personalized experiences and additional services to make your hot air balloon flight in Teotihuacán even more special

items.quote: An unforgettable experience, 100% recommended. You can get picked up, breakfast, balloon, champagne toast. SUBLIME
items.author: Rafael L.

items.quote: The sunrise over the pyramids was magical. The team was very professional and the pilot made us feel safe at all times.
items.author: Maria G.

items.quote: It exceeded all my expectations. From the hotel pickup to the champagne toast, everything was impeccable.
items.author: Carlos M.

items.quote: One of the best experiences of my life. The views of Teotihuacán from the air are incredible.
items.author: Ana R.

items.quote: Excellent service from start to finish. The staff was very friendly and the experience exceeded our expectations.
items.author: Diego S.

items.quote: A perfect gift for my wife. The photos turned out incredible and the memory will last forever.
items.author: Roberto P.

items.quote: Very organized, punctual, and the flight was smooth and exciting. I recommend it without hesitation.
items.author: Laura M.

plus.name: Plus Package
plus.description: Coffee break, 45-60 min flight, travel insurance, certificate, sparkling wine toast, buffet breakfast, round-trip PRIVATE transport (1-4 people).

desayuno.name: Breakfast Package
